sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43215" key="e(terosxhma/tistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερο-σχημάτιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43215.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">differently formed</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἑ</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change of grammatical form</tr_>, as a figure of speech, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2596.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phoeb.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
